task_context.actionable_question: Am I using the full range of learning resources available?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Use vle_diversity_score [FE] to show breadth. Highlight under-used types (e.g. forum rarely used).

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: It appears that there has been no recorded engagement with the learning resources this semester. This lack of activity suggests that you may not be utilizing the available resources to their fullest potential.

Insights: No Resource Engagement: You have not engaged with any learning resources this semester, which indicates a missed opportunity to enhance your understanding and performance in the course.

Educational implications: Engaging with a variety of resources can significantly improve your learning experience and outcomes.

Recommendations: high - Start exploring available learning resources regularly. - Using a diverse range of resources can help you grasp concepts better and stay engaged with the course material.

explanation.summary: It appears that there has been no recorded engagement with the learning resources this semester. This lack of activity suggests that you may not be utilizing the available resources to their fullest potential.

insights.title: No Resource Engagement
insights.description: You have not engaged with any learning resources this semester, which indicates a missed opportunity to enhance your understanding and performance in the course.

educational_implications: Engaging with a variety of resources can significantly improve your learning experience and outcomes.

recommendations.action: Start exploring available learning resources regularly.
recommendations.rationale: Using a diverse range of resources can help you grasp concepts better and stay engaged with the course material.

confidence.reason: Data indicates no recorded engagement, providing a clear picture of current resource usage.

required_core_outputs.description: State the student's resource usage breadth across available VLE types.
Identify under-used resource types when a comparison baseline is available.

evaluation_constraints.description: Use vle_diversity_score as the primary resource-breadth metric when returned.
Do not label low usage of a resource type as disengagement when no comparison baseline is provided.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
